title: More Villager Trades
description: Gives villagers a little more use by adding some extra trades
body:
This mod gives villagers a little more use by adding some more trades for villagers.

**_MVT is currently a work in progress and more trades will be added with each update._**

current villager types with new trades:
- Butcher
- Farmer
- Fisherman
- Fletcher
- Librarian
- Wandering trader (yes the one everyone hates)

examples:
- (butcher) uncooked food + emerald > cooked food
- (farmer) sell apples for emeralds
- (fletcher) sell bow/crossbow for emeralds

_(this is not a full list)_
